channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Trump transition says Cabinet picks, appointees were targeted by bomb threats, swatting attacks
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A number of President-elect Donald Trump 's most prominent Cabinet picks and appointees have been targeted by bomb threats and “swatting attacks," Trump's transition team said Wednesday. The FBI said it was investigating.
item.dc:creator: JILL COLVIN and ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trump turns to outsider to shake up Navy, but his lack of military experience raises concerns
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump's nominee to be secretary of the Navy, John Phelan, has not served in the military or had a civilian leadership role in the service.
item.dc:creator: TARA COPP, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: 3 killed, 1 seriously injured in Tesla Cybertruck crash in Northern California
item.description: Three people were killed and one seriously injured when a Tesla Cybertruck crashed and caught fire in Northern California.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Federal court dismisses defamation lawsuit against Fox News for Jan. 6 conspiracy theory
item.description: A federal judge has dismissed a defamation lawsuit against Fox News brought by a former Marine and Trump supporter who claimed he was made a scapegoat by the network after the Jan. 6, 2021, U.S. Capitol insurrection.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade in NYC: See the balloons inflate before the big day
item.description: The 98th annual Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade will take over Manhattan Thursday morning, lining the streets with extravagant balloons and fanfare.
item.dc:creator: Emily Rahhal, KREX 5

item.title: Docs: Ex-Avon choir teacher filmed sexual videos in his classroom, sent them to girls on Snapchat
item.description: AVON, Ind. — A former choir and theater teacher in the Avon school system faces felony charges after allegedly filming himself masturbating in his classroom and sending the videos to teen girls. Kayvon H.
item.dc:creator: Joe Schroeder, NewsNation

item.title: Disney agrees to $43 million settlement in gender pay lawsuit
item.description: The agreement settles allegations initially made in a 2019 lawsuit filed by Disney employee LaRonda Rasmussen, who claimed she was getting paid less than her male counterparts in the same role.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, WGN 9

item.title: 3 Americans held for years in China have been released, White House says
item.description: Three American citizens imprisoned for years by China have been released and are returning to the United States, the White House said Wednesday, announcing a rare diplomatic agreement with Beijing in the final months of the Biden administration.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: As Americans prepare for Thanksgiving, veterans face food insecurity in significant numbers: study
item.description: President and CEO of America's Warrior Partnership asks people to give back this Thanksgiving when many veterans cannot afford to put food on the table.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: First Harris video since losing goes viral for wrong reasons and more top headlines
item.description: Get all the stories you need-to-know from the most powerful name in news delivered first thing every morning to your inbox.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 4 takeaways from Trump's health agency nominations
item.description: Almost all have been highly critical of the agencies they would run if confirmed, and experts say the nominees represent a complete overhaul of the vision and priorities of key agencies for health care and public health.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Weixel, KRON4

item.title: Oregon tribe has hunting and fishing rights restored under a long-sought court ruling
item.description: The Confederated Tribes of Siletz Indians in Oregon have just celebrated newly lifted restrictions on their rights to hunt, fish and gather.
item.dc:creator: Claire Rush, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Mississippi asks for execution date of man convicted in 1993 killing, lawyers plan to appeal case to SCOTUS
item.description: Mississippi's attorney general is requesting an execution date for a death row inmate, but the man's lawyer says he plans to appeal to the U.S. Supreme Court.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump names speechwriter Vince Haley as Domestic Policy Council chief
item.description: President-elect Trump announced on Tuesday night that Vince Haley, his campaign speechwriter, will be the next chief of the Domestic Policy Council (DPC). “As Director of the Domestic Policy Council, Vince will help make life better for ALL Americans, and unify our Country through SUCCESS.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, NewsNation

item.title: Trump-backed Florida official resigns, announces run for Gaetz seat
item.description: Florida’s Chief Financial Officer Jimmy Patronis resigned from his position and announced his candidacy for former Rep. Matt Gaetz's (R-Fla.) seat in the 1st Congressional District on Monday. In a letter addressed to Florida Gov.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, NewsNation

item.title: Rudy Giuliani draws rebuke for a courtroom outburst accusing judge in assets case of being unfair
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — In an angry outburst in a New York courtroom, Rudy Giuliani accused a judge Tuesday of making wrong assumptions about him as he tries to comply with an order requiring him to turn over most of his assets to two election poll workers who won a libel case against him. U.S.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump vows tariffs over immigration. What the numbers say about border crossings, drugs and crime
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — In a Monday evening announcement, President-elect Donald Trump railed against Mexico and Canada, accusing them of allowing thousands of people to enter the U.S.
item.dc:creator: REBECCA SANTANA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Does your Thanksgiving turkey always come out dry? This might be why
item.description: Every year in the weeks leading up to Thanksgiving, the holiday conversation inevitably turns to one question regarding the annual feast: is turkey any good? While debates and discussions about which side dishes are the best, it seems like the star of the show often gets overlooked, or worse, malign
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Tank explodes, catches fire near GM facility in Michigan
item.description: A tank containing byproducts from oil drilling operations exploded and caught fire Tuesday near the General Motors Proving Ground in southeastern Michigan, damaging two nearby homes but causing no injuries, a fire chief said.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Israel, Lebanon's Hezbollah agree to a ceasefire to end nearly 14 months of fighting
item.description: Israel approved a United States-brokered ceasefire agreement with Lebanon's Hezbollah on Tuesday, setting the stage for an end to nearly 14 months of fighting linked to the ongoing war in the Gaza Strip.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: How Trump's bet on voters electing him managed to silence some of his legal woes
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — One year after the Jan. 6, 2021, U.S. Capitol attack, Attorney General Merrick Garland said the Justice Department was committed to holding accountable all perpetrators “at any level” for “the assault on our democracy.
item.dc:creator: ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump's threat to impose tariffs could raise prices for consumers, colliding with promise for relief
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — If Donald Trump makes good on his threat to slap 25% tariffs on everything imported from Mexico and Canada, the price increases that could follow will collide with his campaign promise to give American families a break from inflation.
item.dc:creator: TOM KRISHER and CHRISTOPHER RUGABER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: San Francisco watchdog Ricci Wynne arrested, suspected of pimping
item.description: Wynne has legions of social media followers. Over the past three years, videos posted on his social media pages, RawRicci415, garnered hundreds of thousands of views.
item.dc:creator: Amy Larson, Fox 5

item.title: Court rejects request to sideline San Jose State volleyball player on grounds she’s transgender
item.description: A federal appeals court upheld a ruling Tuesday that allows a San Jose State women’s volleyball team member to play in this week’s Mountain West Conference tournament after a legal complaint said she should be ineligible on grounds that she is transgender and thus stronger, posing a safety risk to t
item.dc:creator: AMY BETH HANSON, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Pursuit suspect, police engage in shootout; multiple people detained
item.description: Authorities were pursuing the driver of a fleeing Maserati near West Adams in Los Angeles Tuesday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, Fox 5

item.title: Tim Walz accepts turkey presentation as he eases back into his duties as Minnesota's governor
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — As feathers flew, Tim Walz accepted the symbolic presentation of a turkey Tuesday as he eases back into his duties as Minnesota's governor following the Harris-Walz ticket's defeat in the presidential election.
item.dc:creator: STEVE KARNOWSKI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Dog treats distributed to Florida recalled for potential salmonella
item.description: A chicken-based dog treat sold online and in stores across 19 states has been recalled over the potential risk of salmonella.
item.dc:creator: Carlos Mathis, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Israel approves proposed ceasefire with Lebanon's Hezbollah
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu on Tuesday recommended his Cabinet approve a United States-brokered ceasefire agreement with Lebanon's Hezbollah, setting the stage for an end to nearly 14 months of fighting linked to the ongoing war in the Gaza Strip.
item.dc:creator: JOSEF FEDERMAN, KAREEM CHEHAYEB and BASSEM MROUE Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: WATCH: Man throws coffee at charging elk in Colorado
item.description: A video has surfaced of a man throwing what appears to be coffee at a bull elk at Evergreen Lake in Colorado.
item.dc:creator: Greg Nieto, Fox 5

item.title: Mexican cattle imports suspended after New World screwworm detected
item.description: Mexico’s chief veterinary officer said they discovered the screwworm in a cow at an inspection checkpoint close to the border with Guatemala.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, Fox 5

item.title: Virginia pilot, dog killed in New York plane crash; 2 other dogs found alive
item.description: A Virginia pilot and a rescue dog he was transporting were killed after a plane he was flying crashed in New York on Sunday, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Jenny Gable, KRON4

item.title: Trump threatens to impose sweeping tariffs on Mexico, Canada and China on first day
item.description: The tariffs, if implemented, could dramatically raise prices for American consumers on everything from gas to automobiles to agricultural products.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Biden proposes Medicare, Medicaid cover costly weight-loss drugs like like Wegovy or Ozempic
item.description: A bipartisan coalition of congressional members have lobbied for the drugs to be covered by Medicare, saying it could save the government from spending billions of dollars on treating chronic ailments that stem from obesity.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: What Black Friday's history tells us about holiday shopping in 2024
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The holiday shopping season is about to reach full speed with Black Friday, which kicks off the post-Thanksgiving retail rush later this week.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump's favorability climbs in post-election poll
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump’s favorability climbed by six points after he was elected president earlier this month, a new poll on Tuesday found.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, KRON4

item.title: What to know about the Menendez brothers' resentencing plea
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Erik and Lyle Menendez will have to wait until next year for a decision on whether they should have the possibility of freedom from prison more than 30 years after killing their parents, a judge said. The shotgun killings of Jose and Kitty Menendez on Aug.
item.dc:creator: JAIMIE DING, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Couple charged in ring suspected of stealing $1 million in Lululemon clothes
item.description: A Connecticut couple has been charged in Minnesota with being part of a shoplifting ring suspected of stealing around $1 million in goods across the country.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4
